definition.positive: Osmosis is the movement of water molecules from a region of high water concentration to a region of low water concentration through a semi-permeable membrane.

definition_membrane.positive: A semi-permeable membrane allows water molecules to pass through but restricts other molecules.

queries: why is osmosis important for plant support
explain how osmosis makes plant cells firm
importance_plants.positive: Osmosis makes plant cells firm and provides support to the plant.
